q1.question: Is FlowFi AI really free?
q1.answer: Yes! Our Free plan includes a basic dashboard, manual expense tracking, and a basic financial score. No credit card required to sign up.

q2.question: How does the AI Coach work?
q2.answer: Our AI Coach analyzes your financial data — income, expenses, debts, and goals — to provide personalized advice. It learns from your patterns and gets smarter over time.

q3.question: Is my financial data secure?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We use bank-level 256-bit encryption, and your data is never sold to third parties. We're SOC 2 Type II compliant.

q4.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q4.answer: Yes, you can cancel at any time with no penalties. If you cancel a paid plan, you'll retain access until the end of your billing period.

q5.question: What makes the Financial Score different from a credit score?
q5.answer: Our Financial Score measures your overall financial health — savings habits, spending discipline, and debt management — not just your borrowing history. It's a holistic view.

q6.question: Does FlowFi support multiple currencies?
q6.answer: Yes! FlowFi supports USD, GTQ, EUR, and many more currencies. You can set your preferred currency in settings.

step1.title: Welcome to FlowFi AI!
step1.subtitle: Let's set up your financial profile in just a few minutes. It'll be worth it, we promise.

step2.title: How much do you earn?

step5.title: What are you saving for?
step5.subtitle: Pick a goal or create your own. Having a target makes saving easier.

step6.title: Have receipts or invoices?
step6.subtitle: Upload a document and our AI will read it automatically. You can always do this later.
